nasb.text: for they all saw Him and were terrified. But immediately He spoke with them and *said to them, “Take courage; it is I, do not be afraid.”

esv.text: for they all saw him and were terrified. But immediately he spoke to them and said, “Take heart; it is I. Do not be afraid.”

cnv.text: 因為他們都看見了他，非常恐懼。耶穌立刻對他們說：“放心吧！是我，不要怕。”

ccb.text: 全船的人看见祂，都吓坏了，耶稣立刻对他们说：“放心吧，是我，不要怕！”

csbs.text: 因为他们都看见了他，就惊慌不安。耶稣立刻与他们讲话，对他们说：“鼓起勇气吧！是我，不要怕。”
